title: Stabilize dashboard dependency baseline and capture audit snapshots

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Starting phase 1: restore lock/install consistency, then capture baseline full and prod-only audit snapshots plus top-level dependency versions.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Phase 1 completed: lockfile reconciled with npm install --package-lock-only; npm ci now succeeds. Baseline audits: full 52 (15 low,23 moderate,12 high,2 critical); prod-only 4 moderate and 0 high/critical. Key versions confirmed: next 15.6.0-canary.61, @excalidraw/excalidraw 0.18.1, @aws-amplify/backend 1.22.0, @aws-amplify/backend-cli 1.8.2.
